title: Rules of Engagement
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|set of rules|the West End book of a similar title, ''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]''}}
The '''Rules of Engagement''' were the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] rules for engaging an enemy in combat. A [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] was required to learn and exercise these rules before they were allowed to obtain the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] tested [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on these rules during the [[Dorvalla Incident]].

==Rules of Engagement==
Known Rules of Engagement are listed below:
*''A Jedi uses the Force and the lightsaber only for defense, never for Attack.''
*''Understand the dark and light in all things.''
*''Learn to see accurately.''
*''Open your eyes to what is not evident.''
*''Exercise caution, even in trivial manners.''

==Appearances==
*''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
